ABS ESP MK60 v18

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 01
Func Name: ABS

        "firstbyte": 3,

        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 12,

        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 5,
    "sentbytes": "21C2",
    "name": "RDBLI_System_Status_Frame",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat ABS": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat feux de stop": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat MSR": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat REF": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Moteur pompe": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Tension d alimentation": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 7,
    "sentbytes": "21C3",
    "name": "RDBLI_Vehicle_Configuration_Frame",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {

        "firstbyte": 6,
